heading: Syntax
body:
```sh
db.runCommand({ createStore: <store-name>, provider: <storage-provider>, region: <region-name>, bucket: <bucket-name>, additionalStorageClasses: [ <storage-classes> ], delimiter: <delimiter>, public: true|false })
```
